title: 10 Pcs Multipurpose Non Scratch Wire Dishcloth, Reusable Wire Dishwashing Rag, Wet and Dry Metal Dishcloths for Kitchen Cleaning, Sinks, Dishes, Stoves (20 x 20 cm)
features: POWERFUL CLEANING, SURFACE-SAFE: Crafted from microfiber this non scratch wire dish cloth easily removes dirt and grease—without leaving scratches. safe on non-stick cookware, glass stovetops, and other delicate surfaces.
REUSABLE AND QUICK TO DRY: Wire dishcloth rinses clean with ease and dries quickly—no odor. the breathable mesh design boosts airflow, keeping it fresh and ready for your next clean.

CLEANS A VARIETY OF STRUCTURES: Whether wiping down countertops or scrubbing tough stovetop residue, these metal cleaning cloth adapt to every surface. their bendable structure fits into corners and edges, giving you full control for a deeper, more thorough clean.

PRODUCT SIZE: Multipurpose wire dishwashing rags measures 7.87 inches by 7.87 inches and features a tightly woven mesh that creates rich lather to quickly clean your kitchen while reducing hand fatigue.
MULTI-PURPOSE CLEANING: Metal dish cloth for cleaning dishes, pots, pans, stovetops, and sinks. also suitable for grills, tiles, and outdoor tools—making it a versatile all-in-one cleaning essential.
